rp_webserver_begin.tooltip: Start the web server and start listening

rp_webserver_handle_client.tooltip: Handle client requests (should be placed in the loop)

rp_webserver_on.tooltip: Register the request processing function of the specified path

rp_webserver_on_not_found.message0: When %1 receives an unknown path request
rp_webserver_on_not_found.tooltip: Handle requests that do not match any route (404)

rp_webserver_send_custom_type.message0: %1 Response status code %2 Custom type %3 Content %4
rp_webserver_send_custom_type.tooltip: Send HTTP response with custom Content-Type

rp_webserver_uri.tooltip: Get the URI path of the current request

rp_webserver_method.tooltip: Get the HTTP method of the current request (GET/POST, etc.)

rp_webserver_method_is.tooltip: Determine whether the current request is the specified HTTP method

rp_webserver_arg_by_name.tooltip: Get request parameter value based on parameter name

rp_webserver_arg_by_index.message0: %1 Gets the value of the %2th parameter
rp_webserver_arg_by_index.tooltip: Get request parameter value based on index (starting from 0)

rp_webserver_arg_name.message0: %1 Gets the name of the %2th parameter
rp_webserver_arg_name.tooltip: Get request parameter name based on index (starting from 0)

rp_webserver_args_count.tooltip: Get the number of request parameters

rp_webserver_has_arg.tooltip: Checks whether a parameter with the specified name exists

rp_webserver_header.message0: %1 Gets the value of request header %2
rp_webserver_header.tooltip: Get the request header value of the specified name

rp_webserver_has_header.tooltip: Check whether the request header with the specified name exists

rp_webserver_host_header.tooltip: Get the Host header of the request

rp_webserver_collect_headers.tooltip: Set the request headers to be collected (separate multiple with commas)

rp_webserver_authenticate.tooltip: Verify username and password for HTTP Basic Authentication
